cast.name: Greg Cool
cast.character: Fan Waving Dollar Bills at Cheerleaders

plot outline: A comedy based on the 1987 professional football players' strike. Gene Hackman plays the coach of the team, Jack Warden is the owner, Brett Cullen is the All-Pro quarterback that goes on strike and Keanu Reeves is the "scab" who replaces the star QB.
title: The Replacements

distributors.name: HBO Pacific Partners of Netherlands Antilles
